hints.description: This company provides telecommunications services, including cable television, internet access, and phone services, primarily to residential customers. They also offer business services like high-speed internet and voice solutions to small and large businesses. Led by CEO Christopher Winfrey, the company is notable for its significant broadband footprint and ongoing investments in network infrastructure.
hints.funFact1: In 2016, the company acquired *****, a provider of wireless broadband services, to expand its offerings and compete more effectively in the telecommunications market.
hints.funFact2: The company’s origins trace back to a small cable operation in Scranton, Pennsylvania, founded in 1993, and grew rapidly through a series of acquisitions throughout the 1990s and 2000s.
